column6:
Same record need to split into 2 separate records with the specialty on this field if the below condition matches
IF PRESENT AND Primary Specialty <> Secondary Specialty
  VALIDATE AGAINST Taxonomy Crosswalk Description
    IF PRESENT -> Split and map an additional record with the specialty into I N/w output
    IF Not PRESENT -> Reject the split additional record with the speciality into error report
Note: Input might contain both Taxonomy Code and Description. Hence Crosswalk should be able to populate the corresponding values in output file (and the validation should be case in-sensitive)
Note: For additional records, the Secondary Specialty should be populated in the Primary Specialty field
